title: Despair and communication failure while a round UFO landed on a farm [2008]
excerpt: JULY 28th, 2008. Time: 8:45 pm. text_preview: JULY 28th, 2008. Time: 8:45 pm. For 25 minutes, the residents of a farm near the city of Camapuã, State of Mato Grosso do Sul, became desperate when they witnessed an unidentified flying object landing and then taking off just 1 km away from them. The UFO was round, emitted many lights and it was observed under good conditions of visibility and weather. The COMDABRA’s report [Brazilian Aerospace Defense Command], also informs that a retired military from the Aeronautics “contacted OPO-CG [Operational Permanence Officer of Campo Grande Air Base, State of Mato Grosso do Sul] and informed him tha
summary: On Jul 28, 2008 farm residents near Camapuã, MS witnessed a round lit UFO land and take off 1km away, causing panic and loss of phone/cell communications for 25 minutes.
